title: Solar Panels vs Community Solar
description: Community solar can help renters or shaded homes benefit from solar without rooftop panels.
winnerSummary: Rooftop solar can create more control and savings, while community solar is useful when your home is not a good solar candidate.
bestForA: Homeowners with a sunny roof and long-term plans.
bestForB: Renters, shaded homes, or homeowners avoiding installation.
costConsiderations: Compare subscription terms, bill credits, roof system quotes, and cancellation rules.

faqs.question: Can renters use community solar?
faqs.answer: Often yes, depending on local program availability and utility rules.

sources: U.S. Department of Energy solar financing resources
Consumer Financial Protection Bureau financing education
EnergySage solar equipment and financing education
